The '''Praesitlyn Defense Force''' was the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] military force stationed on [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] to defend the [[Intergalactic Communications Center]].

It was commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Khamar]] and his subordinate, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Llanmore]]. It consisted of mixed [[Human/Legends|Human]] and [[Sluissi]] officers and included at least two [[Battalion/Legends|battalions]] of ground troops, several wings of [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|T-19 starfighters]] and several recon platoons, each of which was equipped with military-refitted civilian [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]] and given only one set of [[Model TT4 Holorecording Macrobinoculars|TT-4s]].

Khamar felt that the force was too small to defend Praesitlyn, and has requested additional troops and [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] to defend the world, but [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] refused additional aid. This caused him to wonder if someone in the Republic wished for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] to attack the world.

The force was entirely wiped out during the opening stages of the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], except for [[Erk H'Arman]] and [[Odie Subu]].

==Personnel==
*[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Erk H'Arman]], T-19 pilot
*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Khamar]], commanding officer
*[[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Kreen]], engineer
*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Llanmore]], executive officer
*[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Makx Maganinny]], scout team leader
*[[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Pleth Strom]], T-19 pilot.
*[[Odie Subu]], scout
*[[Tami]], scout
*[[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] "[[Waterboy]]," air control officer
